tool_calls.name: execute_sql

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"SELECT repo, number, additions, closes_linear, title FROM github_pull_requests WHERE state = 'open' AND additions > 400 AND (closes_linear IS NULL OR closes_linear = '')"}
